task_title: Narrative: what this support ticket is actually about

scores.justification: Agent successfully fetched ticket t019 and user u042's record using `./cli/bin/ctl get tickets t019 --format json` and `./cli/bin/ctl get users u042 --format json`.

Agent explicitly connected the billing issue to u042's suspension on 2026-04-22, noting in the final paragraph that the system 'suspended her account on the morning of April 22 without any prior warning' and that this suspension caused the checkout failure.
Agent identified and connected all three flagged orders (o102, o107, o115) to the situation, noting they were 'automatically flagged' and listing them explicitly in the narrative.

Agent proposed a plausible root-cause hypothesis: 'an overzealous automated fraud rule that punished a normal customer for making several purchases in quick succession across currencies,' attributing the suspension to an anomaly detector misinterpreting legitimate multi-currency purchasing.

The paragraph stays grounded in evidence from the transcript: order dates (April 19–21), currencies (GBP, USD, EUR), suspension date (April 22), flagged order IDs (o102, o107, o115), and the reference to ticket t001 all appear in the fetched data.
